title: [W]Your claim has been submitted
whatHappensNextItemOne: [W]We'll check your claim and may contact you if we have any questions
whatHappensNextItemTwo: [W]We'll contact you once we've sent your claim to the respondents and explain what happens next
whatHappensNextItemThree: [W]Please be advised that the current processing time is approximately 20 working days. This may extend during busy periods.
downloadClaimHint: [W]The questions you've answered are populated on our prescribed PDF form. This means the questions may appear differently in their wording or order on the version you download. This will not affect how the tribunal deals with your claim.
claimQuestionsText: [W]Contact the following tribunal office if you have any questions about your specific claim:
processQuestions: [W]For questions about the employment tribunal process
processQuestionsText: [W]Call one of our Employment Tribunal customer contact centres. They cannot give you legal advice.

survey.text: [W]to help improve this service for you and others.

Unassigned: [W]Unassigned - We will notify you once your claim has been assigned to a tribunal office
